mdSummary:
# BackToTop

Floating button that scrolls the page back to the top.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/back-to-top

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| BackToTop | VisibilityThreshold | `int` | `300` |  |
| BackToTop | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| BackToTop | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| BackToTop | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| BackToTop | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
